problem_text_cn: μ子电量q=-e（e=1.6×10⁻¹⁹ C），静止质量m₀=100 MeV/c²，静止寿命τ₀=10⁻⁶ s。在地球赤道上空h=10⁴ m处，一μ子以接近光速垂直向下运动。1. 求μ子至少需多大总能量才能到达地面；2. 若赤道上空10⁴ m范围内地磁场为匀强磁场（B=10⁻⁴ T，方向平行地面），求该能量μ子到达地面时的偏离方向和总偏转角。
problem_text_en: The charge of a μ meson is q=-e（e=1.6×10⁻¹⁹ C）, its rest mass m₀=100 MeV/c², and its rest lifetime τ₀=10⁻⁶ s. At a height h=10⁴ m above the Earth's equator, a μ meson moves vertically downward at a speed close to the speed of light. 1. Find the minimum total energy the μ meson must have to reach the ground；2. If the geomagnetic field within 10⁴ m above the equator is a uniform magnetic field（B=10⁻⁴ T，direction parallel to the ground）, find the deviation direction and total deflection angle of the μ meson with this energy when it reaches the ground.
problem_solution_cn: （1）最小总能量：- 地球时间t ≈ h/c，μ子寿命τ = τ₀ / √(1 - β²) ≥ t，能量E = m₀ c² / √(1 - β²) ≥ m₀ c h / τ₀ ≈ 3.3×10³ MeV。（2）偏转分析：- 坐标系：Oxyz（x向西，y向上，z向北），洛伦兹力F = -e v × B，动力学方程dp/dt = F。- 分量方程：ẍ = -ω ẏ，ÿ = ω ẋ（ω = c² e B / E），解得x = (v/ω)(1 - cosωt)，y = h - (v/ω) sinωt。- 到达地面时y=0，sinωt ≈ c e B h / E ≈ 0.091，偏转角α ≈ (ω h)/(2v) ≈ 0.046 rad（向西偏转）。
problem_solution_en: （1）Minimum total energy：- The Earth time t ≈ h/c，and the lifetime of the μ meson τ = τ₀ / √(1 - β²) ≥ t. The energy E = m₀ c² / √(1 - β²) ≥ m₀ c h / τ₀ ≈ 3.3×10³ MeV。（2）Deflection analysis：- Coordinate system：Oxyz（x westward，y upward，z northward），Lorentz force F = -e v × B，dynamic equation dp/dt = F。- Component equations：ẍ = -ω ẏ，ÿ = ω ẋ（ω = c² e B / E），solving gives x = (v/ω)(1 - cosωt)，y = h - (v/ω) sinωt。- When reaching the ground, y=0，sinωt ≈ c e B h / E ≈ 0.091，deflection angle α ≈ (ω h)/(2v) ≈ 0.046 rad（deflected westward）。
problem_answer: 1. μ子至少需总能量$3.3×10^{3}\ 	ext{MeV}$；2. 偏离方向向西，总偏转角约$0.046\ 	ext{rad}$
